content: Three.js quaternion smoothing: Quaternion.slerp() is the standard interpolation method. For jitter reduction: MathUtils.damp() on Euler angles or apply slerp with alpha = dt * smoothingFactor. For network input prediction: maintain a ring buffer of the last N quaternions, apply exponential moving average or slerp toward latest received. Input prediction (dead reckoning): apply last known angular velocity to predict orientation for frames where no packet arrived. Interpolation should be in the SDK layer, not game code — expose smoothed quaternion as default, raw as opt-in. Game loop pattern: game calls getPlayerInput() each frame; SDK returns interpolated value from internal ring buffer updated by WebRTC onmessage.
